latestLead.pageTitle: FundedHive - Best Prop Firm of 2026 with Daily and Instant Payouts
latestLead.pageDescription: Experience the most innovative and transparent prop firm with daily payouts processed in less than 60 seconds.
latestLead.pageText:
NEW HERE? GET 25% OFF | Use code WELCOME25 | NEW TRADERS ONLY | NEW HERE? GET 25% OFF | Use code WELCOME25 | NEW TRADERS ONLY | NEW HERE? GET 25% OFF | Use code WELCOME25 | NEW TRADERS ONLY | Home Transparency Reviews Leaderboard Features AADS Pay From Profits Metamask Smart Hive Contract cTrader Truth Protocol FAQ Blog Contact Login INSTANT DAILY PAYOUT NO TEAM APPROVAL REQUIRED SENT WITHIN 60 SECONDS OF REQUEST The world's first Web3-based prop firm, enabling A-book trading on funded accounts. All withdrawals displayed on the blockchain for ultimate transparency. Join the Hive About funding models Introducing Our Challenge Models All FundedHive Challenges have no consistency rules, no maximum lot size limits, and all drawdowns are balance-based and static, so your targets never move against you. Every account is 100% swap-free, allowing you to hold trades overnight without extra costs. We also guarantee zero price manipulation on our charts, backed by the only slippage protection in the industry (T&C’s apply) Choose the model Pay From Profits LOW ENTRY 2-Step Classic POPULAR Instant Growth NEW Pay From Profits 2-Step Classic Instant Growth NewBee Start Leverage WorkerBee Medium Leverage QueenBee Highest Leverage 2k 5k 10k 25k 50k 100k 200k Phase 1 Phase 2 Funded Profit Target/Phase 8% 6% - Max Daily Loss (EOD) 5% 5% 5% Overall Loss (Static) 10% 10% 10% Max Loss / Trade 3% 3% 3% Profit Split - - 70% Hive Coin Refund - - 200% News Trading Yes Yes Yes FX Leverage (Dynamic) 1:50 1:50 1:50 Consistency Rule No No No Weekend Holding Yes Yes No Profitable Days 3 3 - Phase 1 Phase 2 Funded Profit Target/Phase 8% 6% - Max Daily Loss (EOD) 4% 4% 4% Overall Loss (Static) 10% 10% 10% Max Loss / Trade 3% 3% 3% Profit Split - - 80% Hive Coin Refund - - 200% News Trading Yes Yes Yes FX Leverage (Dynamic) 1:100 1:100 1:100 Consistency Rule No No No Weekend Holding Yes Yes No Profitable Days 3 3 - Phase 1 Phase 2 Funded Profit Target/Phase 8% 6% - Max Daily Loss (EOD) 3% 3% 3% Overall Loss (Static) 10% 10% 10% Max Loss / Trade 3% 3% 3% Profit Split - - 90% Hive Coin Refund - - 200% News Trading Yes Yes Yes FX Leverage (Dynamic) 1:200 1:200 1:200 Consistency Rule No No No Weekend Holding Yes Yes No Profitable Days 3 3 - Trading Platform Price $15 One time fee no funded fee is required* Buy Challenge FAQ PDF Trading Platform Price $19 One time fee no funded fee is required* Buy Challenge FAQ PDF Trading Platform Price $29 One time fee no funded fee is required* Buy Challenge FAQ PDF Our challenges are designed to accommodate varying levels of trading skill. The more professional you are, the more leverage you can access, though you must also manage your risk responsibly. At FundedHive, we offer flexible trading conditions, with news trading permitted across all challenge types. Expert Advisors (EAs) are allowed if they are not used for HFT bots or to exploit technical glitches. Copy trading and hedging are disallowed to preserve authentic performance and maintain a level playing field for all. 1-Step 2-Step $5,000 $10,000 $25,000 $50,000 $100,000 $200,000 5k 10k 25k 50k 100k 200k Phase 1 Funded Profit Target/Phase 10% - Max Daily Loss (EOD) 5% 5% Overall Loss (Static) 10% 10% Max Loss / Trade 3% 3% Profit Split - 80% Hive Coin Refund - 200% News Trading Yes Yes FX Leverage (Dynamic) 1:50 1:50 Consistency Rule No No Weekend Holding Yes No Profitable Days 3 - Phase 1 Phase 2 Funded Profit Target/Phase 8% 6% - Max Daily Loss (EOD) 5% 5% 5% Overall Loss (Static) 10% 10% 10% Max Loss / Trade 3% 3% 3% Profit Split - - 80% Hive Coin Refund - - 200% News Trading Yes Yes Yes FX Leverage (Dynamic) 1:50 1:50 1:50 Consistency Rule No No No Weekend Holding Yes Yes No Profitable Days 3 3 - Trading Platform Access fee $19 Funded account starts at $49 * (You can pay from profits if Low or Moderate risk) Start Challenge FAQ PDF Trading Platform Access fee $9 Funded account starts at $49 * (You can pay from profits if Low or Moderate risk) Start Challenge FAQ PDF Funded Fee Upfront From Profits Low Risk Moderate Risk Medium Risk High Risk PDF Pay From Profits fee structure Download PDF Pay From Profits fee structure Download * Disclaimer: In the PayFromProfits model, after passing both phases, your funded account is activated with a fixed 80% profit split. The price of the funded account is determined by the risk management category assigned to you based on your trading performance during the evaluation phases. To learn more about how these risk categories are defined, please visit our Terms and Conditions. Once you pass the phases and your funded account is issued, the profit split remains a constant 80%, supporting a transparent and sustainable growth path for all traders. The PayFromProfits system is designed to reward disciplined trading while giving every successful trader equal access to the same favorable funded conditions. 80% Profit Share Introducing the first of its kind Instant "Tower" Challenge a new path where traders can climb levels instantly, scale faster, and experience growth like never before. HOW DOES IT WORK? Step 3: Scale or Cash out Withdraw instantly, or use a portion of the profits to unlock the next level and double your account size again. The choice is always yours. Step 2: Double Your Account Hit just 6% profit and your account will instantly double in size. You pay for each scaling from the profits you generated on a previous level. Step 1: Trade & Scale First level runs in a demo environment with instant payouts during scaling. From level 2 onward, you trade with A-Book execution. T&Cs apply. Instant Funding Start trading instantly without waiting for approvals or long verification times. Access your account and begin growing from day one. Instant Payouts Withdraw your profits in seconds through fully automated smart contracts. No delays, no manual processing, no excuses. 6% Scale Target Reach only 6% profit to instantly double your account size and unlock the next funding level. While you pay from the profits to scale. No Minimum Trading Days Trade with full freedom. No limits, no forced waiting periods your pace defines your growth. Scale even daily. No Daily Loss Limit There are no daily loss limits, so your strategy can unfold naturally without restrictions. Only 6% maximum loss and a 2% maximum loss per trade. No Consistency Rule Your trading style is your choice. There are no consistency rule requirements, you can earn your profit target in any trades or days. Trading Rules *Account scaling doubles up to the 5th level. After that stage, growth continues but is not symmetrical, following a gradual scaling structure to maintain system balance and sustainability. Scale to $1 million This model allows traders to scale their accounts while paying directly from profits, achieving steady growth all the way up to $1,000,000 in funded capital. Levels GOLDEN TOWER Scaling from Payouts LEVEL 10 $1,000,000 $0 LEVEL 9 $750,000 $0 LEVEL 8 $600,000 $0 LEVEL 7 $400,000 $0 LEVEL 6 $250,000 $0 LEVEL 5 $150,000 $2,990 LEVEL 4 $80,000 $1,599 LEVEL 3 $40,000 $899 LEVEL 2 $20,000 $449 LEVEL 1 $10,000 $299 Each scaling level is paid from a portion of the profits earned at the previous stage. You only pay the starting fee once every next level in the Tower is fully funded by your own demo trading performance. If you need support on Web3 integration join our Discord Server Discord Invite Link WEB3 User Guide PAYOUT CERTIFICATES SIZE OF THE HIVE Registered Traders 67972 Join the Hive No More Upfront Challenge Fees Choose Your Challenge Pick the funding level that matches your goals. Whether you aim for $50,000 or go for the full $200,000, your journey starts with a small access fee. No complicated options. No overwhelming choices. Select your challenge size, trade your strategy, and pay for your funded account only if you pass. Start Your Challenge With Just a Small Access Fee You can enter the first phase of your challenge with a low access fee, designed to keep the focus on your skills, not on your budget. This is your chance to access real capital with one of the lowest entry costs in the industry, because we believe traders should invest in their skills, not in expensive challenge fees. Phase Two
One Step Closer to Your Funding After successfully passing Phase One, you can continue by paying the next small access fee, bringing you one step closer to unlocking your funded capital. If you don’t pass, your only cost is that small access fee—there’s no full challenge price at stake. This gives you the freedom to learn, improve, and try again without heavy financial pressure. Pay For The Funded Account After You Pass Once you successfully complete both challenge phases, you unlock the opportunity to access real funding. The better your risk control and trading discipline, the lower the cost of your funded account fee. This model provides every trader a fair chance to access capital at a price that reflects their performance. INSTANT PAYOUTS on the blockchain FundedHive's Smart Hive Contract leverages blockchain transparency and automation to transform trading. Every trade, funding allocation, and payout is immutably recorded, allowing traders to verify transactions automatically and independently. Automated smart contracts ensure secure, instant payouts, while advanced security measures protect against unauthorized access. This transparency fosters trust, deters unethical practices, and strengthens the community through collaboration within a fair and verifiable trading environment. Transparency Total security with the Hive Smart Contract At FundedHive, security is woven into every transaction through the SmartHive Contract. Built on blockchain technology, it creates a tamper-proof record of all activity, ensuring every trade and payout is protected. Advanced safeguards, like proxy patterns, fortify the system against breaches, while automated processes eliminate errors and manual vulnerabilities. This robust security framework e

outbound.opener: Vi Experience the most innovative and transparent prop firm with daily payouts processed in less than 60 seconds. e parece haver uma ligação clara a community/audience.
outbound.dm: Olá, vi o teu trabalho ligado a trading/forex e pareceu-me que pode haver uma conversa interessante de parceria. Lidero Business Development e trabalho com parceiros, comunidades e afiliados em mercados globais. Faz sentido falarmos 15 minutos esta semana?
outbound.followUp: Acho que há potencial para uma conversa objetiva: audiência/comunidade de trading, estrutura de parceria e crescimento com uma corretora regulada. Tens disponibilidade esta semana?
